full_text:
Ma Yan 馬延
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ma Yan (馬延). Served Yuan Shang, and later Cao Cao. Killed by Gan Ning. Ma Yan was affiliated with Yuan Shang and the Wei Kingdom. Ma Yan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
